llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.1 (Recognition of Classified Employees) moved from its original position to before oral communication. Item 6.1 (Approval of Bond Program Consent Items) moved from consent to action due to public comments. Items 6.2 and 6.3 moved to action. President Márquez also noted adding a staff recognition for Wendy Kelly.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: can I please get a motion to approve it? So moved. Second. All those in favor? Aye.

items.intro_words: Great. Good evening, everyone. Roll call, please. Evelyn.
